query_normalized: investigating the validity of the inverse square law at sub-millimeter scales physics
rationale: The paper surveys short‑range (sub‑millimeter) laboratory tests of gravity, directly addressing measurements of the inverse‑square law at the length scales of interest (same‑mechanism evidence, criterion (a)). It therefore constitutes a key reference for any literature review on the validity of the inverse‑square law at sub‑mm distances.
